display.purpose: Hero headlines, main title. Used rarely (≤1 per screen).

body.purpose: Primary content, instructions, descriptions. Max 65–75ch line length.

shadows.name: focus-ring-light
shadows.purpose: Focus indicator in light mode. Keyboard navigation highlight.

shadows.name: focus-ring-dark
shadows.purpose: Focus indicator in dark mode. Higher contrast for accessibility.

motion.name: standard-ease
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (200ms). Smooth, not bouncy.

motion.name: reduced-motion-fallback
motion.purpose: When prefers-reduced-motion is enabled, use instant transitions.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Tablet / small desktop. Control panel switches from drawer to sidebar.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Desktop. Full layout with side-by-side canvas and controls.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button. Dark background, light text, very rounded pill style.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: #1c1e1e; color: #fcf9f6; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 26px; border: none; font-family: 'Inter Variable', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; font-variation-settings: 'wght' 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #353739; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(112, 128, 144, 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-primary { transition: none; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: none; } }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Light background, dark text, pill-shaped.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: #f8f8f7; color: #1c1e1e; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 26px; border: 1px solid #eae8e6; font-family: 'Inter Variable', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background-color: #eae8e6; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(112, 128, 144, 0.3); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-outline { transition: none; } }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form input with soft rounding and light gray background.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 22px; background-color: rgba(234, 232, 230, 0.5); color: #1c1e1e; border: none; font-family: 'Inter Variable', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8d8d8d; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(112, 128, 144, 0.3); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-input { transition: none; } }

components.name: Slider
components.description: Range input for numeric control. Light track, dark thumb, smooth feedback.
components.css: .ds-slider { width: 100%; height: 4px; border-radius: 2px; background: linear-gradient(to right, #1c1e1e 0%, #1c1e1e 50%, #eae8e6 50%, #eae8e6 100%); outline: none; -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; } .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: #1c1e1e; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb:hover { transform: scale(1.1); } .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(112, 128, 144, 0.3); } .ds-slider::-moz-range-thumb { width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: #1c1e1e; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-slider::-moz-range-thumb:hover { transform: scale(1.1); } .ds-slider::-moz-range-track { background: transparent; border: none; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb, .ds-slider::-moz-range-thumb { transition: none; } }

components.name: Card Container
components.description: Content container with soft rounded corners and light background.
components.html:
Pattern Options

Choose from various symmetric patterns.
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #f8f8f7; border: 1px solid #eae8e6; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px; font-family: 'Inter Variable', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 12px 0; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #1c1e1e; } .ds-card-content { margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; color: #1c1e1e; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Label + Control Group
components.description: Form group with label and input. Demonstrates spacing and typography.
components.css: .ds-control-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Inter Variable', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #1c1e1e; } .ds-input-sm { height: 32px; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 22px; background-color: rgba(234, 232, 230, 0.5); border: none; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1c1e1e; } .ds-input-sm:focus { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(112, 128, 144, 0.3); }

narrative.overview: This system supports a creative tool for exploring generative mandala art. The design is warm, approachable, and intentionally playful—inviting casual creators to experiment without technical intimidation. The mandala canvas is the hero; the UI scaffolds the creation without competing for attention. The palette is restrained (mostly neutrals), and interactions feel smooth and responsive.
keyCharacteristics: Soft, generous border radius (friendly and approachable)
Grayscale + single accent (warm reddish tone); accent used sparingly for key actions
Smooth transitions and gentle feedback on interaction
Content-forward layout (canvas maximized on desktop, adaptive on mobile)
Accessibility built-in (color-blind safe, keyboard nav, reduced motion support)

rules.name: The Warmth Rule
rules.body: Gray tints favor neutrality with a hair toward warm (slightly reduced blue channel), never toward clinical blue. The single saturated accent (warm reddish tone) is reserved for states that demand attention; its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: Inter Variable in multiple weights replaces font mixing. This eliminates the 'indecision' feel of three competing typefaces and ensures consistency at any scale.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No persistent shadows. Surfaces are flat; focus and state change are conveyed through color shift and focus ring only.

dos: Do use the warm reddish accent for errors, destructive actions, and warnings only
Do pair text labels with icons on all interactive elements
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion by removing transitions; instant transitions are fine
Do test all text at 18px small-text size for ≥4.5:1 contrast
Do keep buttons, inputs, and cards very rounded (pill-style, rounded-3xl or rounded-4xl)
Do maximize canvas space on desktop; adapt control panel to mobile
donts: Don't use the SaaS corporate look (sharp corners, clinical symmetry)
Don't clutter the interface with too many visible controls at once
Don't use the minimalist coldness aesthetic (sterile white, hard shadows)
Don't pair colors that are both desaturated and on the cool end
Don't use red/green color pairs without additional visual markers
Don't animate layout properties without careful performance testing
Don't use side-stripe borders as accent
Don't gate content visibility on a transition
